opportunities.label: Review Response Automation
opportunities.signal: 4.1 rating across 67 reviews with zero visible owner responses detected.
opportunities.observation: Unanswered reviews signal indifference to customers, suppressing conversion from Google searchers.
opportunities.fix: AI auto-generates personalized responses to every new Boise Rooter review within hours.

opportunities.label: Online Scheduling Automation
opportunities.signal: Phone-only contact with no booking tool, form, or GMB booking button present.
opportunities.observation: Boise homeowners searching after hours book competitors with instant online scheduling instead.
opportunities.fix: Deploy AI chat widget capturing job type, address, and preferred time without phone calls.

opportunities.label: Call Capture CRM
opportunities.signal: No CRM or marketing tools detected and zero digital intake beyond a phone number.
opportunities.observation: Every missed or unbooked call from Boise leads vanishes with no follow-up possible.
opportunities.fix: AI logs every call, captures caller data, and triggers automatic follow-up sequences instantly.
